title: Section 23
content: The compensation, fines and expenses mentioned in section 22 may be recovered as if they were fines imposed by the Magistrate.]1
footnote: 1. See ss. 63 to 70 of the Indian Penal Code (45 of 1860), and s. 421 of the Cede of Criminal Procedure, 1973 (2 of 1974); cf. also. s. 25 of the General Clauses Act, 1897 (10 of 1897).
